summary: Current generator-side guard boundaries do not need a broad relaxation; the frozen L108 official-contact and evaluation-criteria boundary queries already bypass the preempt helper, and the post-trim helper preserves a boundary-safe partial official-contact answer. The remaining false-abstain signals in the baseline are therefore better handled by tighter regression coverage than by widening the sensitive marker net.

accepted_fields_or_changes: Add exact L108 regression coverage in scripts/check_evidence_guard_fixtures.py for q20260707_l108_004_kefi_official_contact_boundary and q20260707_l108_002_hanyoung_eval_criteria_vendor_caveat so the contract around official-contact answers and final-vendor/score caveats stays pinned to the frozen wording.
Keep the generator's sensitive-preempt and sensitive-post-trim logic narrowly scoped; do not broaden the marker lists globally just to eliminate the L108 false-abstain reports.
If a source change is still desired later, make it a symmetric, phrase-level exception rather than a blanket 'official contact' or 'evaluation criteria' exemption.
rejected_or_risky_items: Do not relax all official-contact queries out of the sensitive guard; that would create a broad under-blocking hole for genuinely unsafe contact-fabrication prompts.
Do not treat every evaluation-criteria question as answerable; the exception should only apply when the query explicitly asks to withhold the final vendor/score and keep the scope-summary part only.
Do not change protected scoring logic in scripts/evaluate.py as part of this worker proposal.
needs_orchestrator_review: Confirm whether the end-to-end false_abstain metric should stay driven by answer text classification in evaluate.py, since the generator-side helpers already return boundary-safe results on the frozen examples.
Decide whether the exact L108 regression cases should be mirrored in any downstream scorer calibration fixture once the proposal is accepted.

commands_run: python probe against src.generator._preempt_sensitive_abstention_answer and _apply_sensitive_abstention_guard using the frozen L108 official-contact and evaluation-criteria queries
python read of baseline_default/details.json to inspect the false_abstain list for the L108 batch
observed_results: _apply_sensitive_abstention_guard preserved a boundary-safe partial official-contact answer on the frozen official-contact query (the returned string matched the input answer).

baseline_default/details.json still reports false_abstain entries for q20260707_l108_001_hanyoung_budget_vs_final_contract, q20260707_l108_002_hanyoung_eval_criteria_vendor_caveat, and q20260707_l108_004_kefi_official_contact_boundary.
